## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / tooling only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Task / issue

<!-- e.g. Task 012, closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **Docs** — `PROJECT_DOCS/` updated if behavior, scope, or process changed
- [ ] **Tests** — Play mode / Editor validation run where applicable (note menus or scenes used)
- [ ] **No secrets** — No `google-services.json`, `GoogleService-Info.plist`, `firebase_options.json`, `.env`, keystores, or tokens
- [ ] **Unity hygiene** — No `Library/`, `Temp/`, `Logs/`, or local `UserSettings/` committed
- [ ] **Playable** — Game still opens and core scene loads (or N/A for docs-only)
- [ ] **Branch** — Targets `dev` (or `main` for release/hotfix per [BRANCHING.md](../PROJECT_DOCS/BRANCHING.md))
